results.title: Trump threatens to target Iran’s power plants, bridges unless Tehran returns to talks
results.description: Washington, July 15 (SocialNews.XYZ) US President Donald Trump has threatened to target Iran’s power plants and bridges next week unless Tehran returns to negotiations, saying American strikes would intensify over the coming days. “We’re going... The post Trump threatens to target Iran’s power plants, bridges unless Tehran returns to talks appeared first on Social News XYZ .

results.title: Sources: Unimpressed Atleti end Greenwood talks
results.description: Marseille forward Mason Greenwood is nearing a four-year deal deal with Fenerbahçe after Atlético Madrid dropped their pursuit of the former Manchester United player -- saying he was unreachable, sources told ESPN.
